headline: ServiceNow Targets $30 Billion As AI Revenue Story Accelerates
summary: ServiceNow projects 2030 subscription revenue above Wall Street estimates, with Now Assist expected to drive 30% of annual contract value.

headline: Snowflake Is Up 9% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Cloud Stocks Like ServiceNow?
summary: Shares of Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) are climbing in early Thursday trading, jumping roughly 9% intraday to around $152. The data cloud platform is leading enterprise software higher and outpacing peer ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW), which is also green but rising at a slower clip. ServiceNow stock is trading 5% higher to around $94, a respectable bounce in its ... Snowflake Is Up 9% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Cloud Stocks Like ServiceNow?

headline: Despite The Downturn, ServiceNow (NOW) Is Still One Of The Best Cloud Computing Companies To Buy
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the 8 Best Cloud Computing Stocks To Buy In 2026. On April 19, J.P. Morgan analyst Mark Murphy maintained a Buy rating on ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) and set a target price of $195. The firm’s price target implies an additional 116% upside from here. On a more bearish note, […]

headline: NiCE Advances the Future of AI-First Customer Experience with ServiceNow
summary: HOBOKEN, N.J., May 07, 2026--NiCE (Nasdaq: NICE) today announced the availability of its NiCE ServiceNow joint solution, closing the gap between front-office engagement and back-office execution. Organizations can trigger complex enterprise workflows the moment a customer interaction begins.
